name: Chicken and Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin, bone, and halve the chicken breasts.
2. Lay the chipped beef on the bottom of a baking dish.
3. Turn the ends of the chicken breasts under and lay them on top of the beef.
4. Mix the mushroom soup and sour cream in a bowl.
5. Spread the mixture over the top of the chicken.
6. Dot with bacon pieces.
7. Sprinkle with paprika.
8. Cover with foil.
9. Bake at 275 degrees for 2-1/2 hours.
